brief.objective: Drive interest in the new AI-powered task prioritization feature ahead of the fall product event
brief.audience: Existing customers managing large boards (100+ open tasks), especially team leads frustrated with manual triage
brief.key_message: This is the most revolutionary feature we've ever shipped — guaranteed to 10x how fast your team clears its backlog
brief.constraints: The exact phrase "the most revolutionary feature we've ever shipped — guaranteed to 10x how fast your team clears its backlog" must appear verbatim in the key message as already approved by leadership
